title: ranunculus hirsutus var. parvulus
intro: Ranunculus hirsutus var. parvulus, also known as small-flowered hairy buttercup, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family Ranunculaceae. The plant is primarily recognized for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, derived from its root and leaves. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Ranunculus hirsutus var. parvulus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
